acridEarth000000.name: Acrid Earth
acridEarth000000.description: You wield earth as a chemist wields reagents, its caustic bite answering a sharp and incisive mind. Your usage of the Rune of Earth scales with Intellect instead of Wisdom.

acrobat000000000.name: Acrobat
acrobat000000000.description: You fight with the fluid grace of an acrobat, treating your weapon as a vaulting pole as readily as an armament. While wielding a Balanced 2H weapon, your movement does not provoke Disengagement. Your whirling weapon also bats aside incoming missiles, imposing +2 Banes on ranged attacks made against you.

vaultingSweep.name: Vaulting Sweep
vaultingSweep.description: You vault into the air and crash down amid your foes, your weapon whirling in a dazzling arc. Choose a point within your Stride and leap to it, then make a Strike against every creature within your weapon's reach of where you land.

adrenaline000000.name: Adrenaline
adrenaline000000.description: Pain sharpens your concentration. Once per round, when you sustain Health damage from an attack, you gain +1 Focus.

adrenalineSurge0.name: Adrenaline Surge
adrenalineSurge0.description: You can draw upon exceptional reserves of physical strength to meet challenges imposed on your body.

adrenalineSurge.name: Adrenaline Surge
adrenalineSurge.description: You expend Heroism and benefit from +2 Boons to any action which scales using Strength for 3 Rounds. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

alchemicalresolv.name: Alchemical Resolve
alchemicalresolv.description: You rapidly apply alchemical vapours which instill your ally with supplemental bravery in the face of horror.

alchemicalResolve.name: Alchemical Resolve
alchemicalResolve.description: You rapidly bolster the Morale of an ally within 4 feet by applying vapours. Perform a Medicine check against the target's Madness Threshold. Successful checks restore Morale.

alchemyJourneyma.name: Alchemy Journeyman
alchemyJourneyma.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the alchemical sciences and can work through some of the more advanced alchemical processes given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common ingredients are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer recipes and ingredients.

alchemyNovice000.name: Alchemy Novice
alchemyNovice000.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Alchemy and are capable of working with most common concoctions and decoctions.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify alchemical ingredients and their properties.

anticipateharm00.name: Anticipate Harm
anticipateharm00.description: Your keen reflexes and acuity allow you to anticipate imminent danger and react to avoid it.

anticipateHarm.name: Anticipate Harm
anticipateHarm.condition: You are targeted by an area-of-effect attack, the source of which you can see.
anticipateHarm.description: You may immediately move 4 feet after the area-of-effect of the attack is declared. If this movement escapes the area of the attack, you are unaffected.

arcanaAdept00000.name: Arcana Adept
arcanaAdept00000.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Arcana skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

arcanaJourneyman.name: Arcana Journeyman
arcanaJourneyman.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Arcana skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

arcanaMaster0000.name: Arcana Master
arcanaMaster0000.description: You gain the Master rank in the Arcana skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

arcanaNovice0000.name: Arcana Novice
arcanaNovice0000.description:
Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

arcanearcher0000.name: Arcane Archer
arcanearcher0000.description:
Your skill with archery can shape your spellcraft, partially substituting for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcasting.

While using a Projectile weapon as your mainhand weapon, you ignore the free-hand requirement for casting spells using the Arrow gesture and the range of those spells becomes your weapon range.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a projectile weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

armorCrusher0000.name: Armor Crusher
armorCrusher0000.description: You have mastered the art of striking armored opponents with such force that the armor itself becomes a weapon against them.

armorCrusher.name: Armor Crusher
armorCrusher.description: You make an unarmed Strike against a nearby enemy. If the attack results in a Glancing Blow, you spend 1 Focus if possible to deal bonus damage equal to your Toughness score.

armoredefficienc.name: Armored Efficiency
armoredefficienc.description: You are trained in wearing the heaviest types of armor while still retaining mobility. You are able to use a free Movement action once per Turn while wearing Heavy armor.

armoredInstinct0.name: Armored Instinct
armoredInstinct0.description: You instinctively angle your body to absorb the brunt of deflected blows. When an attack against you results in a Glancing Blow, you gain +1 Resistance against the damage dealt.

armoredShell0000.name: Armored Shell
armoredShell0000.description:
You are expert in using your armor in combination with your shield to create a defensive shell.

When you have the @Condition[guarded] condition and have a Heavy Shield equipped, your base Armor defense is reduced by half but your Block defense increases by a corresponding amount.

artfulparry00000.name: Artful Parry
artfulparry00000.description: You anticipate dodging an attack, intercepting it to intentionally Parry the strike.

artfulParry.name: Artful Parry
artfulParry.condition: You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.
artfulParry.description: When you defend against a melee attack using the Dodge defense, you can react and expend Focus to instead Parry the attack.

artificer0000000.name: Artificer
artificer0000000.description: You excel in applying the skills of Arcana, Glyphweaving, and Enchanting to create innovative and practical equipment. You can perform temporary modification of equipment to apply affix enchantments or to deepen the strength of a particular enchantment.

imbueAffix.name: Imbue Affix
imbueAffix.description:
Over the course of a During a @Action[default rest], you channel arcane energy into your equipment, inscribing an Affix as a temporary enchantment. Choose one physical item that has capacity for enchantment and temporarily imbue it with a Tier 1 Affix of your choice. The imbued affix persists until you use Imbue Affix again.

Playtest Notes

You may currently imbue any affix that the chosen item can bear. In a future update this will be limited to affixes which you are able to Enchant.

amplifyAffix.name: Amplify Affix
amplifyAffix.description: Over the course of a @Action[default rest], you deepen the potency of an Affix enchantment on one of your items. Choose one Affix on a physical item you have equipped and increase the Tier of that affix by one, up to its maximum. This amplification persists until you use Amplify Affix again.

assassin00000000.name: Assassin
assassin00000000.description:
You specialize in bringing death the the unwary. Any Strike or Spell attack against an @Condition[unaware] target becomes Deadly.

An Unaware creature hit by your attack may not alert its allies until its own turn in Combat.

markForDeath.name: Mark For Death
markForDeath.description:
You spend 1 minute studying a creature. Perform a Knowledge Test about your target. If successful, you learn all damage types against which the target is Vulnerable. Your minimum Initiative during the first round of Combat becomes one greater than the Initiative of your marked target.

Playtest Notes

This action is not yet automated.

assessstrength00.name: Assess Strength
assessstrength00.description:
You take a moment to observe a creature which you can see and develop intuition about its areas of strength.

Perform a Knowledge Test using a Skill chosen by the Gamemaster. On a success, you learn which Defense type of Physical, Fortutude, Willpower, or Reflex is highest for the creature. On a Critical Success you learn the two highest defense types.

assessStrength.name: Assess Strength
assessStrength.description: You observe a creature you can see to assess it's notable areas of strength.

athleticsAdept00.name: Athletics Adept
athleticsAdept00.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

athleticsJourney.name: Athletics Journeyman
athleticsJourney.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

athleticsMaster0.name: Athletics Master
athleticsMaster0.description: You gain the Master rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

athleticsNovice0.name: Athletics Novice
athleticsNovice0.description:
You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

awarenessAdept00.name: Awareness Adept
awarenessAdept00.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Awareness skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

awarenessJourney.name: Awareness Journeyman
awarenessJourney.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Awareness skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

awarenessMaster0.name: Awareness Master
awarenessMaster0.description: You gain the Master rank in the Awareness skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

awarenessNovice0.name: Awareness Novice
awarenessNovice0.description:
You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

backstab00000000.name: Backstab
backstab00000000.description: You focus your cunning instincts on exploiting the weak points of a flanked target. You identify an opportunity and strike with deadly efficiency.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.condition: You are attacking a target with the Flanked condition.
backstab.description: You Strike with your weapon against a @Condition[flanked] target, dealing Deadly damage.

bard000000000000.name: Bard
bard000000000000.description:
You practice the oral and musical traditions of heroic storytelling to inspire courage in your allies, demoralize your foes, and be quick with unconventional solutions to problems.

You learn Rune: Soul if you do not already know it. When restoring the morale of allies using the Rune of Soul you gain +2 Boons to your roll.

laughingMatter.name: Laughing Matter
laughingMatter.condition: An enemy's attack fails to deal any damage or cause any effect to you or any ally.
laughingMatter.description:
When an enemy's attack fails to deal any damage or cause any effect to you or any ally, you construct a cutting jest or pantomime which makes a fool of their feeble effort.

You make an Performance skill attack against the target's Fortitude, dealing Psychic damage to Morale upon a success. Furthermore, upon a success, the target suffers 1 Bane to all rolls until the start of their next turn.

The target must be able to see and understand you to be affected by this ability.

bastion000000000.name: Bastion
bastion000000000.description:
You have mastered the art of the defensive stand, becoming an unbreakable wall. While you have the @Condition[guarded] condition, you have the following benefits:

  • You cannot be moved against your will or knocked @Condition[prone].

  • Your space cannot be crossed by enemies, even when using abilities that would normally move through a creature.

  • Your Engagement increases by +1, holding more foes at bay.

  • Your Reflex defense is treated as the sum of your Armor and Block defenses, if greater, as you endure attacks rather than avoiding them. An attack against your Reflex which you resist is treated as having been defended by Block.

getBehindMe.name: Get Behind Me
getBehindMe.description:
Choose an ally adjacent to you and reposition them to be directly behind you, based on your direction of facing at the time this action is used, interposing yourself between that ally and their attackers.

This movement does not provoke reactions for Disengagement and the protected ally gains the @Condition[guarded] condition until the start of their next turn.

battlefocus00000.name: Battle Focus
battlefocus00000.description: You find focus and calm within the thrill of battle. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health or Morale you gain +1 Focus. This benefit may occur at most once per Round.

battleWorn000000.name: Battle-Worn
battleWorn000000.description: Your body has endured so many injuries that it has learned how to mend itself with remarkable efficiency. When you perform the Rest action, you recover additional Wounds equal to half your Toughness score (rounded down).

beastmaster00000.name: Beastmaster
beastmaster00000.description:
You have trained your animal companion to aid you in combat. Your companion may participate in encounters as an allied combatant.

Playtest Notes

This talent is not yet automated.

berserker0000000.name: Berserker
berserker0000000.description: You revel in the thrill of combat, hurling yourself into the fray with reckless abandon.

berserkerRage.name: Berserker Rage
berserkerRage.condition: You have suffered damage to your Health pool since your last turn in Combat.
berserkerRage.description: You become @Condition[enraged]. While Enraged you deal 4 additional damage on all melee attacks. You may attempt to end the effect on your own turn by succeeding on a Willpower test against a DC of 20. The effect ends automatically when Combat is concluded.

berserkStrike000.name: Berserk Strike
berserkStrike000.description: You channel your lust for combat into an adrenaline-fueled strike which increases in power as you become more wounded.

berserkStrike.name: Berserk Strike
berserkStrike.description:
You imbue your strike with momentum and intensity, increasing the Damage Bonus of your strike according to your missing Health.

  • If your Health is below 75%, your Strike deals +1 Damage

  • If your Health is below 50%, your Strike deals +2 Damage

  • If your Health is below 25%, your Strike deals +3 Damage

This damage bonus is doubled if you are using a Two-Handed weapon.

bloodfrenzy00000.name: Blood Frenzy
bloodfrenzy00000.description: Your battle lust spurs you to feats of heightened action. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health you immediately gain +1 Action. This benefit may only happen once per Round.

bloodletter00000.name: Bloodletter
bloodletter00000.description:
Your precision with weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage can cause the @Condition[bleeding] condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The @Condition[bleeding] effect lasts for 3 rounds and deals your Dexterity score as additional damage to Health.

bloodmagic000000.name: Blood Magic
bloodmagic000000.description:
You rely upon occult techniques to transform physical pain into arcane potential.

You cast spells by spending Health instead of Focus. When casting a spell each point of Focus costs 10 points of Health instead. Spells you cast cannot restore your own Health.

bodyblock0000000.name: Body Block
bodyblock0000000.description: You lean into an attack which was otherwise defended with your Armor, converting its result into a Block instead.

bodyBlock.name: Body Block
bodyBlock.condition: You defend against a melee attack with your Armor or as a Glance.
bodyBlock.description: An attack which otherwise is defended by your Armor or produced a Glancing blow is converted to a Block and deals no damage.

bullrush00000000.name: Bull Rush
bullrush00000000.description: You can use your physical prowess to push past opponents who block your path.

bullrush.name: Bull Rush
bullrush.description: Make an Athletics skill Attack against an adjacent enemy contested by your target's Fortitude defense. On a success you may move up to your Stride directly through the enemy's space. Your enemy is knocked @Condition[prone] and may not make any attack of opportunity against you. On a failure your movement is blocked and your remain in your current position.

bulwark000000000.name: Bulwark
bulwark000000000.description:
You have expertise in using a Shield to defend yourself and others.

Once per Turn while you have a Shield equipped, you may use the Defend action at a reduced cost of 1 Action Point.

cadence000000000.name: Cadence
cadence000000000.description: You are drilled in performing sequences of melee attacks with rhythmic precision. When you Strike multiple times in sequence using a one-handed melee weapon you gain a stacking +1 Boon for each successive attack.

carefree00000000.name: Carefree
carefree00000000.description:
You are able to compartmentalize and brush off setbacks, providing a remarkable ability to recover from damage to your Morale.

Your Madness Threshold is reduced by 1, making you easier to heal.

champion00000000.name: Champion
champion00000000.description:
You relish the thrill of single combat, aspiring to become a peerless challenger who dominates rivals through overwhelming might and unyielding force of will. You can issue a Challenge, marking a rival creature as your Challenged target, and gaining bonus damage to attacks against it.

So intense is your focus that no rival may flee your grasp. You may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] against your Challenged rival even while you are @Condition[flanked], and so long as you have Focus to spend it costs only 1 Focus instead of an Action.

challenge.name: Challenge
challenge.description:
You single out a worthy foe, binding them to a duel through the sheer force of your presence. The target becomes your Challenged rival until Combat ends, until they are defeated, or until you Challenge a different foe. You may have only one Challenged rival at a time.

While your Challenged rival is the only enemy you are engaged with, your immersion in the duel deepens: at the end of each of your turns you gain stacking +1 Bonus Damage to your melee Strikes against that rival, to a maximum equal to your Presence. This bonus resets to zero if the duel is broken, which happens if another enemy engages you, if your rival escapes your Engagement, or if you Strike any other creature.

chirurgeon000000.name: Chirurgeon
chirurgeon000000.description: Your improvisational expertise with battlefield medicine can save many lives. You make all Medicine checks during combat with +1 Boon.

medicinalCompound.name: Medicinal Compound
medicinalCompound.description:
You delve into your medical supplies, hastily combining whatever you might have available to salve the target's wounds or calm the target's mind. Perform a Medicine Check.

The attempt is contested by the higher of the target's Healing Threshold or Rallying Threshold. If successful the target immediately regains both Health and Morale as well as half that amount at the beginning of each of the subsequent 3 turns.

clarifyintent000.name: Clarify Intent
clarifyintent000.description: You use apply your situational awareness and persuasiveness to rapidly communicate a plan of action to an ally.

clarifyIntent.name: Clarify Intent
clarifyIntent.description: You explain your intentions to an ally within 12 feet. Make an Diplomacy skill attack against your ally's Madness Threshold. If successful they gain +1 Focus and +1 Boon to actions made within the next Round.

cleave0000000000.name: Cleave
cleave0000000000.description: This martial technique is a specialized two-handed fighting maneuver which relies upon brute strength to swing your weapon in a wide arc, hitting multiple enemies in its path.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: A ferocious two-handed swing cleaves through foes in a 120 degree arc.

combatmedicine00.name: Combat Medicine
combatmedicine00.description: Your knowledge and skill in Medicine covers the rapid triage, diagnosis, and treatment of wounds.

combatMedicine.name: Combat Medicine
combatMedicine.description: You rapidly treat the wounds of an ally within 4 feet. Perform a Medicine Check against the target's Wounds Threshold. Your ally's Health is increased by the amount of the Roll in excess of the threshold.

concussiveblows0.name: Concussive Blows
concussiveblows0.description:
Your physical power wielding melee weapons which deal Bludgeoning damage can cause the @Condition[staggered] condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The @Condition[staggered] effect lasts for 1 round and reduces your target's maximum Action by 2.

conjurer00000000.name: Conjurer
conjurer00000000.description: You are a master of Conjuration and the Gesture of Creation to manifest arcane energy as physical form. You can maintain up to 3 such creations simultaneously rather than only one.

conserveeffort00.name: Conserve Effort
conserveeffort00.description: You find calmness and focus in conserving your effort in battle. When you end your Turn with un-spent Action you gain +1 Focus.

controlProficien.name: Control Proficiency
controlProficien.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Control. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Motivate action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

cookingJourneyma.name: Cooking Journeyman
cookingJourneyma.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the culinary arts and can work through some of the more advanced methods of food preparation given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common ingredients are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer recipes and ingredients.

cookingNovice000.name: Cooking Novice
cookingNovice000.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Cooking and are capable of producing many common meals using available ingredients.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify some ingredients and their preparations.

counterevade0000.name: Counter Evade
counterevade0000.description: You are practiced in evasive fighting styles which use an enemy's missed attack to devise an opening to counter-attack.

counterEvade.name: Counter Evade
counterEvade.condition: You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.
counterEvade.description: When you defend against a melee attack with a Dodge, you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.

counterriposte00.name: Counter Riposte
counterriposte00.description: You are expert in translating a parried attack into a swift counter against your exposed enemy.

counterRiposte.name: Counter Riposte
counterRiposte.condition: You Parry an incoming melee Strike.
counterRiposte.description: When you defend against a melee attack with a Parry, you may react and expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike which is Accurate.

counterspell0000.name: Counterspell
counterspell0000.description:
You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

counterspell.name: Counterspell
counterspell.condition: Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.
counterspell.description:
You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.

counterstrike000.name: Counter Strike
counterstrike000.description: You are trained to transition between defending with your shield and a swift counter-attack.

counterStrike.name: Counter Strike
counterStrike.condition: You Block an incoming melee Strike.
counterStrike.description: When you defend against a melee attack with a Block you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.

deathProficiency.name: Death Proficiency
deathProficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Death. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Ennervate action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

deceptionAdept00.name: Deception Adept
deceptionAdept00.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Deception skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

deceptionJourney.name: Deception Journeyman
deceptionJourney.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Deception skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

deceptionMaster0.name: Deception Master
deceptionMaster0.description: You gain the Master rank in the Deception skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

deceptionNovice0.name: Deception Novice
deceptionNovice0.description:
You are a liar and manipulator, and deception is a skill you've practiced. You gain the Novice rank in the Deception skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to construct basic lies and cons, and the telltale signs that tend to give away poor liars. You can construct a basic forgery for most common documents, but they won't stand up to any measure of close scrutiny.

decisiveAction00.name: Decisive Action
decisiveAction00.description: Your sharpened mind thinks quickly amidst the maelstrom of combat, identifying and seizing opportunities that others might miss.

decisiveAction.name: Decisive Action
decisiveAction.description: You expend Heroism to instantly recover half your Intellect in Action. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

defensiveroll000.name: Defensive Roll
defensiveroll000.description: You are a nimble skirmisher, always in movement to stay one step ahead of your enemies in combat.

defensiveRoll.name: Defensive Roll
defensiveRoll.condition: You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.
defensiveRoll.description: When you Dodge a melee attack you can expend Focus to leap into a defensive roll, moving up to your Size in any direction.

defiantWill00000.name: Defiant Will
defiantWill00000.description: As your body weakens, your mind hardens. You gain bonus Willpower defense equal to your Toughness score scaled by the proportion of Health you have lost.

deftgrip00000000.name: Deft Grip
deftgrip00000000.description:
Your grasp of your weaponry is fluid and precise. While wielding a two-handed weapon that scales with Dexterity you may cast spells which require two hands, and attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

You may use Free Movement to equip or unequip such a weapon without any Action cost.

demolitionist000.name: Demolitionist
demolitionist000.description:
Your remarkable expertise with munitions allows you to wield them efficiently amidst the chaos of combat. Each turn, your first usage of a Bomb has a reduced cost of -1 Action.

You are no longer targeted by your own bombs, even if you are otherwise within their area of effect.

dervish000000000.name: Dervish
dervish000000000.description: You are specialized in fighting with two weapons. In combat you become a whirlwind of weapons, deadly to any foes who approach.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: You become a cyclone of whirling weaponry, making Strike attacks with both weapons against every enemy within range.

diplomacyAdept00.name: Diplomacy Adept
diplomacyAdept00.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Diplomacy skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

diplomacyJourney.name: Diplomacy Journeyman
diplomacyJourney.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Diplomacy skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

diplomacyMaster0.name: Diplomacy Master
diplomacyMaster0.description: You gain the Master rank in the Diplomacy skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

diplomacyNovice0.name: Diplomacy Novice
diplomacyNovice0.description:
You know the basics of debate and how to use rhetorical devices to make your arguments more convincing. You gain the Novice rank in the Diplomacy skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to leverage emotion in your words to inspire others or sway their opinions. You can make a convincing argument, and you can generally steer others to agree with your point of view.

dirtytricks00000.name: Dirty Tricks
dirtytricks00000.description: You have pouches of sand and dust that you use to temporarily distract or blind an enemy.

dirtyTricks.name: Dirty Tricks
dirtyTricks.description: You fling debris into the eyes of an enemy. If the Strike is successful, they are @Condition[blinded] until the end of their next Turn.

disarmingriposte.name: Disarming Riposte
disarmingriposte.description: Your ripostes are precise enough to strip a weapon from your foe's grasp. When your @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.counterriposte00]{Counter Riposte} achieves a Critical Hit, the target is disarmed, dropping their main-hand weapon.

disarmingstrike0.name: Disarming Strike
disarmingstrike0.description: A martial technique designed to disarm your opponent, forcing them to drop an object held in one of their hands.

disarmingStrike.name: Disarming Strike
disarmingStrike.description: You make a Strike against a the Reflex defense of a single target. The technique is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage. If successful, the target's mainhand weapon is Dropped.

distancerunner00.name: Distance Runner
distancerunner00.description: You are adept at covering distance quickly. Your Stride increases by 1.

diversionist0000.name: Diversionist
diversionist0000.description: You specialize in using subterfuge to distract or trick your opponent during combat.

distract.name: Distract
distract.description: You make a Deception based Skill Attack against the Willpower defense of a target within 30 feet which can see or hear you. On a success, the target loses 1 Focus.

dreadlord0000000.name: Dread Lord
dreadlord0000000.description: You exude a terrible presence on the battlefield which tests the morale of nearby enemies that behold you, breaking the resolve of the weak-willed.

formidablePresence.name: Formidable Presence
formidablePresence.description: You make an Intimidation skill attack against the Willpower defense of enemies within 12 feet, dealing Void damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition for 1 Round to those whose defense you overcome.

dualWield0000000.name: Dual Wield
dualWield0000000.description: You are adept at fighting with two weapons simultaneously. You can weave attacks together to strike more rapidly than possible with a single weapon.

offhandStrike.name: Offhand Strike
offhandStrike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you make a reduced-cost follow-up Strike with your offhand weapon.

duelist000000000.name: Duelist
duelist000000000.description:
You relish the thrill and skillful mastery of single combat, employing a fighting style that uses a one-handed weapon while keeping your off-hand unoccupied.

While wielding a one-handed melee weapon with your other hand empty, you gain a +2 bonus to your Parry defense as long as you are not @Condition[flanked]. While meeting these criteria, any attack that results in a Glance against your Armor becomes a Parry instead.

estocade.name: Estocade
estocade.description:
You deliver a precise, decisive thrust against a foe you have caught at a disadvantage. You make a Strike with your main-hand weapon which is Empowered and Keen.

You may only perform this attack against a target who is @Condition[exposed], @Condition[prone], @Condition[slowed], @Condition[staggered], @Condition[paralyzed] or who has been disarmed of their main-hand weapon.

dustbinder000000.name: Dustbinder
dustbinder000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Earth. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[corroding] condition.

The Corroding effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals half your Wisdom score as Acid damage to Health each Round.

earthProficiency.name: Earth Proficiency
earthProficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Earth. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Mould action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

enchantingJourne.name: Enchanting Journeyman
enchantingJourne.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the Enchanting arts and can work through some of the more advanced Enchantment rituals given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common glyph-infused components are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rare ritae and sympathetic materials.

enchantingNovice.name: Enchanting Novice
enchantingNovice.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Enchantment and are capable of working with most common charms and enchantments.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify sympathetic materials and their properties.

evasiveArmor0000.name: Evasive Armor
evasiveArmor0000.description: You are fast enough to lean into blows and take them on your armor's strongest points. Any Reflex defense in excess of your Physical defense is added as bonus Armor.

evasiveshot00000.name: Evasive Shot
evasiveshot00000.description: You are an expert at firing shots with ranged weaponry while evading enemy attacks.

evasiveShot.name: Evasive Shot
evasiveShot.description: After performing a ranged weapon attack, you may move up to half your Stride for free.

executionersstri.name: Executioner's Strike
executionersstri.description: You deliver a single decisive strike against a wounded enemy.

executionersStrike.name: Executioner's Strike
executionersStrike.description: You deliver a Strike with a two-handed weapon. If your attack is successful and your opponent is under half their maximum Health, the Strike is Deadly, and the opponent suffers the @Condition[bleeding] condition for 3 Rounds, taking additional damage each Round equal to your Strength score.

extolldeeds00000.name: Extoll Deeds
extolldeeds00000.description: You inspire courage within your allies by extolling the heroic deeds of a companion. You may react by composing a verse, making a quip, or shouting a battle cry when an ally you can see Incapacitates or achieves a Critical Hit against an enemy creature. The celebration of these heroic deeds restores the Morale of your allies within 6 spaces.

extollDeeds.name: Extoll Deeds
extollDeeds.condition: An ally whom you can see slays or scores a critical hit against an enemy.
extollDeeds.description: You compose a verse, make a quip, or shout a battle cry to extoll the heroic deeds of one of your allies. All allies near to you regain Morale equal to half your Presence score.

eyeofthestorm000.name: Eye of the Storm
eyeofthestorm000.description:
After you Delay your Turn, gain +2 Boons on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy that you allowed to act before you that Round.

TODO: Needs automation. For now apply boons manually.

fanofarrows00000.name: Fan of Arrows
fanofarrows00000.description: This difficult ranged weaponry technique allows you to fire a multiple shots with your weapon in a sweeping cone, each targeting a different enemy in the area of effect.

fanOfArrows.name: Fan of Arrows
fanOfArrows.description: You fire multiple projectiles from your ranged weapon in an arc, striking all enemy targets within a 40 foot cone.

feintingstrike00.name: Feinting Strike
feintingstrike00.description: A two-weapon technique which makes a feint with your primary weapon, exposing your target for an off-hand attack.

feintingStrike.name: Feinting Strike
feintingStrike.description:
You feint with your mainhand weapon, making a Deception attack against the target's Reflex defense. You immediately make a Strike with your offhand weapon.

If your Deception was successful, you gain +2 Boons to your Strike and it deals an additional +6 Damage.

ferociousleap000.name: Ferocious Leap
ferociousleap000.description: You leap powerfully into battle to deliver a punishing blow to a nearby enemy with your mainhand weapon.

ferociousLeap.name: Ferocious Leap
ferociousLeap.description: You leap up to 10 feet and perform a Strike against an enemy within melee range of where you land. Your movement ignores difficult terrain and is not blocked by enemy creatures.

flameProficiency.name: Flame Proficiency
flameProficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Flame. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Enkindle action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

flamingArrow0000.name: Flaming Arrow
flamingArrow0000.description: You take time to light and loose an arrow covered in flammable pitch. This shot takes longer but is very damaging to either creatures or structures.

flamingArrow.name: Flaming Arrow
flamingArrow.description: You loose a Empowered ranged strike using a Projectile weapon which deals Fire damage upon impact.

flashFrost000000.name: Flash Frost
flashFrost000000.description: You freeze with the speed of thought, cold striking in an instant rather than creeping in slowly. Your usage of the Rune of Frost scales with Intellect instead of Wisdom.

flashOfSteel0000.name: Flash of Steel
flashOfSteel0000.description: You are an expert in using a thrown weapon to imbalance or expose your target for follow-up strikes.

flashOfSteel.name: Flash of Steel
flashOfSteel.description: You make a Thrown weapon attack, targeting a weak point in your enemy's defences. If the attack hits, the target becomes @Condition[exposed] until the start of their next Turn.

fletchingJourney.name: Fletching Journeyman
fletchingJourney.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the skill of Fletching and can work with some of the more advanced bowcraft techniques given time.

The basic properties of most common Fletchery components are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books to handle rarer schematics and components properly.

fletchingNovice0.name: Fletching Novice
fletchingNovice0.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Fletchery and are capable of working with most common types of bow and their ammunition.

You still need to reference schematics and books to identify useful materials and their properties.

flurry0000000000.name: Flurry
flurry0000000000.description: A martial technique using two weapons to overwhelm a single target with a relentless sequence of attacks.

flurry.name: Flurry
flurry.description: You Strike twice with each weapon, but each strike is Difficult.

flyingkick000000.name: Flying Kick
flyingkick000000.description: An unarmed technique where you launch yourself while running at an enemy in a leaping kick which is empowered to deal additional damage.

flyingKick.name: Flying Kick
flyingKick.description: Move forward at least 3 feet and up to your stride in a straight line to kick an enemy with an empowered Strike.

focusedanticipat.name: Focused Anticipation
focusedanticipat.description: Anticipation leads to decisive action. When you have the highest Initiative score for a Round of combat, you gain +1 Focus.

frostProficiency.name: Frost Proficiency
frostProficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Frost. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Condense action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

fulcrum000000000.name: Fulcrum
fulcrum000000000.description: Balance, positioning, and leverage are your greatest allies in combat. You know how to use a foe's momentum against them and that a small redirection in force can turn the tide of battle.

conserveMomentum.name: Conserve Momentum
conserveMomentum.condition: You Block, Parry, or Dodge an incoming melee Strike.
conserveMomentum.description:
You redirect the force of a melee attack which misses you, pivoting it to instead hit some other adjacent enemy. Your attacker must re-roll their attack targeting their ally instead.

Playtest Notes

This action is not yet automated.

gambit0000000000.name: Gambit
gambit0000000000.description:
Some fight by the book, you fight by the odds. Every exchange is a wager: you read your opponent's intent, make risky bets to goad them into overcommitting, then stake everything on a game-changing payout. You trust your gut, wits, and some arcane chicanery to tilt the odds in your favor, gaining the following benefits:

  • The Tell. You see a blow before it is thrown. Your Dodge defense is calculated using your Intellect instead of Dexterity, if it is higher.

  • Loaded Dice. Fortune bends to those who help it along. Once per round, the first time you roll a 1 on any die, that die is rerolled and you keep the new result.

  • Ante Up. When you make a @Action[default strike], you can choose to intentionally add Banes to it. If the Strike hits, a special Gambit effect increments according to the number of Banes you wagered. These charges last until the end of Combat or until spent.

gambitAllIn.name: All-In
gambitAllIn.description: Every gamble you have made comes due, and you collect all at once. The next single attack or check rolls the maximum possible result on all of its dice. You can activate this action by spending either 6 Gambit charges, or 1 Heroism.

gatheringStorm00.name: Gathering Storm
gatheringStorm00.description: You understand that a storm is not sudden chaos but a patient, gathering force that breaks only when it must. Your usage of the Rune of Storm scales with Wisdom instead of Intellect.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

gestureaspect000.name: Gesture: Aspect
gestureaspect000.description:
You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

gestureAura00000.name: Gesture: Aura
gestureAura00000.description:
You concentrate the arcane power of a Rune to create a maintained field of energy that washes over allies and enemies near to you.

The Aura gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 20 feet radius centered on the spellcaster. The center of this Aura moves with the spellcaster.

Depending on the Rune used, the Aura deals damage or provides healing to any creature which begins its turn inside the Aura. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast, has a base cost of 5 Action and 1 Focus, and must be Maintained costing an additional 1 Focus every subsequent round.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Emanation templates which are linked to the Token and move when the Token moves are a feature coming in Foundry VTT version 14. Automation of the Aura gesture will occur once Crucible depends on Foundry VTT version 14.

gestureBlast0000.name: Gesture: Blast
gestureBlast0000.description:
You hurl the arcane power of a Rune into an intense explosion of energy at a nearby point you can see.

The Blast gesture scales with Intellect and produces a blast with 6 feet radius centered on a point within 60 feet of the spellcaster. The blast deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

gestureCone00000.name: Gesture: Cone
gestureCone00000.description:
You focus the arcane power of a Rune into a narrow cone that projects outwards from your location.

The Cone gesture scales with Intellect and produces a 60 degree cone with a 30 foot radius originating from the spellcaster. The Cone deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

gestureConjure00.name: Gesture: Conjure
gestureConjure00.description:
You coalesce arcane power into a superior form, manifesting a Visitor which appears within 30 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Visitor is a Minion equal to your own Level.

The Conjure gesture scales with Wisdom and the Visitor survives for 12 Rounds. You may only have one active Visitor. Casting another spell using the Conjure gesture replaces your previous Visitor. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Not all Runes have a Visitor actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Conjuration will — for now — manifest a Flame Visitor.

gesturecreate000.name: Gesture: Create
gesturecreate000.description:
You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

gesturefan000000.name: Gesture: Fan
gesturefan000000.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

gestureinfluence.name: Gesture: Influence
gestureinfluence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

gesturepulse0000.name: Gesture: Pulse
gesturepulse0000.description:
Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

gestureray000000.name: Gesture: Ray
gestureray000000.description:
You funnel the arcane power of a Rune into a point and project it outwards in a beam.

The Ray gesture scales using Wisdom and produces a line that is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

gestureSense0000.name: Gesture: Sense
gestureSense0000.description:
You attune your mind to the arcane power of a Rune to sense nearby sources of energy.

The Sense gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 30 feet radius and position that remains centered upon the spellcaster. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus. It may optionally be Maintained at the additional cost of 1 Focus every subsequent round.

This spell allows the caster to detect the presence of spellcraft using the same Rune as the one incorporated in this spell. The sense will also momentarily detect the presence of creatures according to their type.

  • Control: Fiends

  • Death: Undead

  • Earth: Oozes and Earth Elementals

  • Flame: Dragons and Fire Elementals

  • Frost: Giants and Frost Elementals

  • Illumination: Celestials

  • Illusion: Fey

  • Kinesis: Monstrosities

  • Life: Plants and Beasts

  • Storm: Constructs and Storm Elementals

  • Oblivion: Outsiders

  • Soul: Humanoids

gesturestep00000.name: Gesture: Step
gesturestep00000.description:
You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

gesturestrike000.name: Gesture: Strike
gesturestrike000.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

gestureSurge0000.name: Gesture: Surge
gestureSurge0000.description:
You channel the arcane power of a Rune into a rushing wave of energy that surges forward from your current position.

The Surge gesture scales with Wisdom and produces a line that is 10 feet wide and 15 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

gestureward00000.name: Gesture: Ward
gestureward00000.description:
You shape the arcane power of a Rune into a protective barrier used to shield yourself from harm.

The Ward gesture scales using Toughness and provides +6 Resistance against the damage type of the Rune used in the spell. This resistance lasts for 1 Round and you may only have a single Ward at a time. Casting another spell using the Ward gesture replaces your prior Ward. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

gladiator0000000.name: Gladiator
gladiator0000000.description: Once per Round, you can make a Reaction which incorporates a Strike attack without spending any Focus.

glyphweavingJour.name: Glyphweaving Journeyman
glyphweavingJour.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the Runic sciences and can work through some of the more advanced glyphweaving processes given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common Glyphs and their phrases are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rare ideograms and their components.

glyphweavingNovi.name: Glyphweaving Novice
glyphweavingNovi.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Glyphweaving and are capable of working with most common glyphs and engravings.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify particular glyphs and their properties.

hamstring0000000.name: Hamstring
hamstring0000000.description: You use a slashing weapon to target the legs of an enemy and cripple their movement.

hamstring.name: Hamstring
hamstring.description: You make Strike attack which is Difficult, but if successful, inflicts the @Condition[slowed] condition for 3 Rounds.

harrier000000000.name: Harrier
harrier000000000.description: You hound enemies who would rather fight you from afar. You may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] against an enemy engaged with you whenever they make an attack that is not tagged as Melee.

headbutt00000000.name: Headbutt
headbutt00000000.description: You can deliver a brutal close-range strike with your head that catches opponents off-guard.

headbutt.name: Headbutt
headbutt.description:
Make an unarmed Strike against the Fortitude defense of an adjacent enemy. If your Initiative is superior to that of your target, you gain +1 Boon to this attack.

The attack is Difficult and only deals Weakened damage, but if successful it inflicts the @Condition[staggered] for one round.

This action always uses an Unarmed weapon, even if your weapon slots are otherwise occupied.

healer0000000000.name: Healer
healer0000000000.description: You are unparalleled at manipulating vital arcana to treat injuries. You learn Rune: Life if you do not already know it. When healing allies using the Rune of Life you gain +2 Boons to your roll.

fontOfLife.name: Font of Life
fontOfLife.description:
You bring forth an aura of life-giving magic. Immediately upon activation and at the start of your turn for 3 Rounds every ally within 20 feet heals for an amount equal to your Wisdom score.

WIP: This action is currently treated as an Area of Effect, granting healing-over-time effects to those within the initial range. When auras are automated by the system in Foundry VTT version 14, the mechanical implementation of this action will match the description.

heavyWeaponProfi.name: Heavy Weapon Proficiency
heavyWeaponProfi.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

holdfast00000000.name: Hold Fast
holdfast00000000.description: You are a calm anchor in the swirling sea of combat. When you have a Shield equipped, your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

hulkingphysique0.name: Hulking Physique
hulkingphysique0.description: Your hulking frame swells with raw mass. Your Size increases by 1, but your bulk slows you: your Stride and Dodge defense each decrease by 2.

illuminationProf.name: Illumination Proficiency
illuminationProf.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Illumination. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Reveal action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

illusionProficie.name: Illusion Proficiency
illusionProficie.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Illusion. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Seeming action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

impenetrableGuar.name: Impenetrable Guard
impenetrableGuar.description: Your defenses frustrate attackers who struggle to find a gap in your guard. When an enemy's Strike against you results in a Block or Glancing Blow, that enemy suffers 1 Bane on their next Strike against you.

impetus000000000.name: Impetus
impetus000000000.description: You are gifted at exploiting the slowness with which others think. If you are first in Initiative order during a round of Combat, you gain +1 current and maximum Action.

inexorableFlame0.name: Inexorable Flame
inexorableFlame0.description: You recognize that fire can spread with inevitable and unstoppable purpose. Your usage of the Rune of Flame scales with Wisdom instead of Intellect.

inflectioncompos.name: Inflection: Compose
inflectioncompos.description: Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

inflectiondeterm.name: Inflection: Determine
inflectiondeterm.description: Enhance a spell to make it more difficult to counter. Any attempt to Counter-Spell this spell is made with +2 Banes.

inflectionelude0.name: Inflection: Elude
inflectionelude0.description: Enhance a spell to make it more difficult for an enemy to retaliate against its casting. This spell does not provide any opportunity to make reactions that involve Strike attacks, regardless of the results of the spell.

inflectionextend.name: Inflection: Extend
inflectionextend.description:
Enhance the duration of a spell, increasing the duration of its effect. For spells which are instantaneous, any corresponding status conditions that they cause are increased in duration.

Effect duration increases from the Extend inflection are not yet automated in Playtest 1. This inflection is included as an example of the intended direction for the Spellcraft system.

inflectionnegate.name: Inflection: Negate
inflectionnegate.description:
Invert the effect of a spell. An Inverted Life Touch spell which normally heals a target deals Poison damage instead. An Inverted Death Ward spell inflicts vulnerability to Corruption damage upon an adjacent enemy.

The effects of the Negate inflection are not yet automated for Playtest 1. This inflection is included as an example of the intended direction for the Spellcraft system.

inflectionpull00.name: Inflection: Pull
inflectionpull00.description: Empower a spell to attract affected creatures toward the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Pull inflection move are forcibly moved a distance towards the spellcaster equal to the Ability Bonus that applied to the Spell, potentially colliding with walls or other movement-blocking obstacles.

inflectionpush00.name: Inflection: Push
inflectionpush00.description: Empower a spell to repel affected creatures away from the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Push inflection are forcibly moved a distance away from the spellcaster equal to the Ability Bonus that applied to the Spell, potentially colliding with walls or other movement-blocking obstacles.

inflectionquicke.name: Inflection: Quicken
inflectionquicke.description: Enhance a spell by hastening the speed with which it can be cast, at the expense of increased Focus. The Quicken inflection reduces the Action cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Focus cost by 1 in exchange.

inflectionReact0.name: Inflection: React
inflectionReact0.description: Instinctually compose a spell as a Reaction in response to some other action that you observe. The React inflection increases the Focus cost of a spell by 2.

inflectionReshap.name: Inflection: Reshape
inflectionReshap.description:
Enhance a Spell by carefully reshaping and controlling its area of effect at the cost of 2 Focus.

Offensive spells which use a template target only target enemies within the area. Healing spells which use a template target only target allies within the area.

Single target spells do not incur any Banes due to intervening creatures.

inquisitor000000.name: Inquisitor
inquisitor000000.description:
You are an expert in combat against magic users, trained to conserve your energy and strike at the precise moment to thwart an incantation.

The cost of your @Action[default reactiveStrike] is reduced by an additional 1 Action but always costs 1 Focus. When you Strike an enemy in reaction to them casting a spell, a successful hit drains 1 Focus from that enemy and refunds your own; on a Critical Hit their spell is interrupted and the magic is lost.

abjure.name: Abjure
abjure.description: You exert your trained will against hostile sorcery, unraveling its hold over you and your nearby allies. For yourself and each ally within 12 feet suffering a magical condition inflicted by an enemy, make an Arcana check against the lowest Removal DC among their afflicting conditions. Every such condition whose Removal DC your result exceeds is removed.

inspirator000000.name: Inspirator
inspirator000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Soul. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which restore Morale cause the @Condition[inspired] condition.

The Inspired effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as additional Restoration to Morale.

inspireheroism00.name: Inspire Heroism
inspireheroism00.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

inspireHeroism.name: Inspire Heroism
inspireHeroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

intellectualsupe.name: Intellectual Superiority
intellectualsupe.description: It is sometimes a marvel how slowly others around you think. You gain +1 Boon on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy lower than you in Initiative order.

intercept0000000.name: Intercept
intercept0000000.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: Intercept
intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediately moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] against them.

Playtest Notes

The interruption of enemy movement is not yet automated.

interpose0000000.name: Interpose
interpose0000000.description: You are willing to throw yourself into harm's way to protect your allies, subjecting yourself to danger in their stead.

interpose.name: Interpose
interpose.description:
As a Reaction when an adjacent ally is hit or glanced by a single-target attack that targeted their Physical Defense, you may Interpose to become the target of that attack instead.

The attack is negated and the attack is re-evaluated against your own Physical Defense using the same dice rolls from the original attack. The consequences of the attack are resolved according to this new result with you as its target.

interruptingDagg.name: Interrupting Throw
interruptingDagg.description: You are alert and prepared to use your equipped weapon to interrupt enemy spellcraft.

interruptingThrow.name: Interrupting Throw
interruptingThrow.condition: An enemy you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater.
interruptingThrow.description: When an enemy that you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater, you can make a Reaction to perform a Thrown weapon attack against the caster. If your attack results in a Critical Hit the spell is interrupted and its magic is lost.

intimidationAdep.name: Intimidation Adept
intimidationAdep.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Intimidation skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

intimidationJour.name: Intimidation Journeyman
intimidationJour.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Intimidation skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

intimidationMast.name: Intimidation Master
intimidationMast.description: You gain the Master rank in the Intimidation skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

intimidationNovi.name: Intimidation Novice
intimidationNovi.description:
You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

intimidator00000.name: Intimidator
intimidator00000.description: You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

intuitweakness00.name: Intuit Weakness
intuitweakness00.description:
You calm your mind and study the physiology of your foe, seeking a vulnerability in its defenses.

Perform a Knowledge Test using an appropriate Skill chosen by the Gamemaster. On a success, you learn the Damage type that the creature has the greatest vulnerability towards, if any. On a Critical Success you learn the two Damage types which have the largest vulnerability.

intuitWeakness.name: Intuit Weakness
intuitWeakness.description: You still your mind and study the physiology of your foe, attempting to identify a vulnerability in its defenses.

iramancer0000000.name: Iramancer
iramancer0000000.description: Your feats of arcana are fueled by anger. While @Condition[enraged] you may still spend Focus and you deal 2 additional damage to all spell attacks.

ironResolve00000.name: Iron Resolve
ironResolve00000.description: Your physical resilience makes you too tough to be deeply affected by a powerful blow. The critical success threshold for Strikes against you is increased by +1, making you harder to critically hit.

irrepressiblespi.name: Irrepressible Spirit
irrepressiblespi.description: Your tenacity gives you an irrepressible spirit which resists the onset of despair. At the start of your turn if you are not @Condition[broken] you gain 1 Morale.

jewelcraftJourne.name: Jewelcraft Journeyman
jewelcraftJourne.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the art of Jewelcrafting and can work with some of the more advanced cuts and designs given time.

The basic properties of most common gems and ornate metals are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books to handle rare schematics and components properly.

jewelcraftNovice.name: Jewelcraft Novice
jewelcraftNovice.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Jewelcrafting and are capable of working with most common settings and designs.

You still need to reference schematics and books to identify gem stones, ornate metals, and their properties.

juggernaut000000.name: Juggernaut
juggernaut000000.description: You thrive on physical contest, using your extraordinary brawn and grit to overpower creatures whose bulk outstrips even your own. When you @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.unarmedCombatTra grapple] a creature, you are not @Condition[restrained] yourself. The Size of creature that you can Grapple and be Grappled by increases by +1.

throw.name: Throw
throw.description:
You heave the target of your @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.unarmedCombatTra grapple] through the air towards a target point up to a distance of two times your Strength score.

You make an Athletics skill attack against the Reflex defense of your grappled target. On a success the target is thrown, leaving it @Condition[prone]. If its movement is stopped short by a wall or another creature, it slams into the obstacle and suffers Bludgeoning damage from the attack. A creature hurled into open space takes no damage from the throw itself, although it may @Action[default fall].

Regardless of the outcome, your Grapple is released as part of this action.

overrun.name: Overrun
overrun.description:
You lower your shoulder and charge in a straight line, bowling over those who stand in your way.

Move up to twice your Stride in a straight line, passing through the space of any creature that you could @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.unarmedCombatTra grapple]. You make an Athletics skill attack against the Reflex defense of each target, on a success dealing Bludgeoning damage and knocking the creature @Condition[prone].

Your charge is halted by any creature too massive for you to Grapple, which is unaffected by the attack.

justiciar0000000.name: Justiciar
justiciar0000000.description: You are an instrument of justice. Critical Strike attacks also deal the Overflow portion of damage to enemy Morale.

kinesisProficien.name: Kinesis Proficiency
kinesisProficien.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Kinesis. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Propel action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

kineturge0000000.name: Kineturge
kineturge0000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Kinesis. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[bleeding] condition.

The Bleeding effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence ability score as additional Piercing damage to Health.

lastStand0000000.name: Last Stand
lastStand0000000.description: You can muster the toughness and courage to fight on and stand your ground against improbable odds.

lastStand.name: Last Stand
lastStand.description: You expend Heroism to instantly recover two times your Toughness in Health. Your Healing Threshold is reduced by 2 for the next 3 Rounds.

legerdemain00000.name: Legerdemain
legerdemain00000.description: You can silently alter your spellcraft. You can apply Inflections of talent tier 2 using only your hands without the need for vocalization.

legsweep00000000.name: Leg Sweep
legsweep00000000.description: You use a weapon which scales using Strength to sweep your enemy off balance, swinging low to knock them from their feet.

legSweep.name: Leg Sweep
legSweep.description: You make a Strike attack with your mainhand weapon. This technique is Difficult to execute and deals reduced damage, but if successful renders your target @Condition[prone].

lesserregenerati.name: Lesser Regeneration
lesserregenerati.description: Your prodigious hardiness conveys a supernatural capability to recover from wounds quickly. At the start of your turn if you are not @Condition[weakened] you gain +1 Health.

lifeProficiency0.name: Life Proficiency
lifeProficiency0.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Life. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Blossom action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

lightbringer0000.name: Lightbringer
lightbringer0000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illumination. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[irradiated] condition.

The Irradiated effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as Radiant damage to both Health and Morale.

lightWeaponProfi.name: Light Weapon Proficiency
lightWeaponProfi.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lightWeaponTrain.name: Light Weapon Training
lightWeaponTrain.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

markprey00000000.name: Mark Prey
markprey00000000.description: You fire a special shot which deals no damage, but explodes in luminous powder clearly marking your target.

markPrey.name: Mark Prey
markPrey.description: You Strike using a special shot. If your attack is successful the target is @Condition[exposed] for the next 3 Turns.

martialartist000.name: Martial Artist
martialartist000.description: You have honed your body into a dangerous weapon. Your bare fists are treated as weapons of Fine quality, increasing their damage by +1.

mechanicalProfic.name: Mechanical Weapon Proficiency
mechanicalProfic.description: You have a fluent education in the use of crossbows, firearms, and other mechanical weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Mechanical category.

mechanicalWeapon.name: Mechanical Weapon Training
mechanicalWeapon.description: You are familiar in the design and usage of crossbows, firearms, and other similar armaments. You are Trained with weapons in the Mechanical category.

rapidReload.name: Rapid Reload
rapidReload.description: You focus deeply and calm your nerves to quickly Reload your mechanical weapon with exceptional haste.

medicineAdept000.name: Medicine Adept
medicineAdept000.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Medicine skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

medicineJourneym.name: Medicine Journeyman
medicineJourneym.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Medicine skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

medicineMaster00.name: Medicine Master
medicineMaster00.description: You gain the Master rank in the Medicine skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

medicineNovice00.name: Medicine Novice
medicineNovice00.description:
You have a basic education in anatomy, physiology, and medicine. You gain the Novice rank in the Medicine skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You’ve learned the basics of treating common wounds and illnesses, and keep a running list of known alchemical and herbal compounds that can be used for treating particular illnesses. With a little time studying an injured, diseased, or otherwise ill individual you can perform a basic diagnosis and treat accordingly.

mender0000000000.name: Mender
mender0000000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Life. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which restore Health cause the @Condition[mending] condition.

The Mending effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom score as additional Restoration to Health.

mentalfortress00.name: Mental Fortress
mentalfortress00.description: Your strong will makes you exceedingly difficult to influence. You gain +1 to your Willpower defense and +5 resistance to Psychic damage.

mesmer0000000000.name: Mesmer
mesmer0000000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illusion. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[confused] condition.

The Confused effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Psychic damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[disoriented] condition.

mnemonicrealizat.name: Mnemonic Realization
mnemonicrealizat.description:
Your sharpened mind is full of secrets and techniques to remember them. Once per Day you may focus your thoughts and attempt to recall a word that sparks your memory.

The Gamemaster must provide you with a one-word clue that is appropriate for your direction of inquiry. It is left to Gamemaster discretion how direct or vague to be with the clue they provide.

mnemonicRealization.name: Mnemonic Realization
mnemonicRealization.description: You survey your memories attempting to recall a clue for your current situation.

monk000000000000.name: Monk
monk000000000000.description:
You balance monastic discipline with expertise in martial arts, balancing attack and defense in harmony.

While Unarmored, you gain a +2 bonus to your Reflex and Willpower defenses.

While Unarmed you can use the Double Punch action.

doublePunch.name: Double Punch
doublePunch.description: You Strike twice in the blink of an eye, punching with both arms.

naturalWeaponPro.name: Natural Weapon Proficiency
