naturalWeaponPro.description: You have a fluent familiarity with the use of natural bodily weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Natural category.

naturalWeaponTra.name: Natural Weapon Training
naturalWeaponTra.description: You have a developed familiarity with using features of your own body as a natural weapons including claws, jaws, tails, or other mechanisms of self-defense. You are Trained with weapons in the Natural category.

wildStrike.name: Wild Strike
wildStrike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike, you perform a reduced-cost follow-up Strike against the same target using a different Natural weapon that you have access to.

necromancer00000.name: Necromancer
necromancer00000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Death. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[decaying] condition.

The Decaying effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals half your Presence score as Corruption damage to Health each Round.

neverYield000000.name: Never Yield
neverYield000000.description: Your determination refuses to let your body's limits slow you down. While @Condition[weakened], your action point penalty is reduced from -2 to -1.

nosferatu0000000.name: Nosferatu
nosferatu0000000.description:
You are afflicted with a rare blood mutation which allows your wounds to rapidly heal through hematophagy.

You can restore your Health by biting a living target. This attack is made with a Superior Natural weapon which scales using Strength and deals Piercing damage.

Your vulnerability to Radiant damage increases by 10.

vampiricBite.name: Vampiric Bite
vampiricBite.condition: Your target is a living creature.
vampiricBite.description: You grasp an enemy and bite it with sharp incisors, rapidly draining its blood to heal your own wounds. This attack requires a free hand to grasp your target while you feed, and recovers your Toughness score in Health.

oblivionProficie.name: Oblivion Proficiency
oblivionProficie.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Oblivion. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Erase action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

operator00000000.name: Operator
operator00000000.description:
You have ice in your veins and remain cool under pressure. Your physical toughness and mental acuity allow you to hone the danger of your situation to achieve the greatest results when the stakes are highest.

While in combat and not @Condition[incapacitated], you gain +1 Boon to all checks when you have less than 50% of your maximum Health remaining. You gain +2 Boons to all checks when you have less than 25% of your maximum Health remaining.

coldFocus.name: Cold Focus
coldFocus.description: You expend Heroism, drawing icy clarity from your circumstances to restore 1 Focus, plus 1 additional Focus for every 25% of your maximum Health you are missing, to a maximum of 5.

opportunist00000.name: Opportunist
opportunist00000.description: You seize any opportunity you can to capitalize on an enemy who turns their back on you. You may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] even if you are otherwise Fully Engaged.

opportunisticspe.name: Opportunistic Spellcraft
opportunisticspe.description: Your quick thinking can weave magic to exploit brief windows of opportunity. You may make a Disengagement Attack using the Touch Gesture instead of a melee weapon attack.

overwatch0000000.name: Overwatch
overwatch0000000.description: You hold the battlefield in your sights, ready to punish any foe who acts within your line of fire. A spellcaster who weaves magic before you risks not only your shot, but the unraveling of their incantation.

coveringFire.name: Covering Fire
coveringFire.condition: An enemy you can see casts a spell, or takes an action that targets a creature other than itself.
coveringFire.description: You may React to make a ranged Strike against that enemy. On a Critical Hit against a caster, the spell is interrupted and the magic is lost. A self-targeted action that is not a spell, such as Move or Defend, does not trigger this Reaction, which may be used only once per Round.

patientdeflectio.name: Patient Deflection
patientdeflectio.description: Your expertise with martial arts allows you to dodge or deflect blows as effectively as a heavily armored fighter. While unarmed, half your Wisdom score contributes to your Parry defense.

peltast000000000.name: Peltast
peltast000000000.description:
To you, a thrown weapon is not released - it is directed. Weapons that depart your hand are guided by an arcane discipline which bends its path to your will, lending your throws a reach and precision that no unaided arm could match. Weapons you throw are returned unerringly back to your grasp. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can @Action[default throwWeapon] using any melee weapon or shield with full effectiveness, even those not designed to be thrown.

  • A weapon designed for throwing with the Thrown property gains +10 feet of range in your hands, reaching 20 feet.

  • Weapons you throw automatically and immediately return to your hand.

ricochet.name: Ricochet
ricochet.description:
Make a Thrown weapon attack at an enemy within range. Guided by your arcane instinct, your weapon ricochets onward to the closest enemy within a maximum distance equal to your Intellect where wall blocks its path.

The weapon will continue caroming from foe to foe, hitting each only once, until it has struck a maximum number of enemies equal to half your Intellect.

Resolve a separate attack against each enemy struck. Each target after the first suffers a cumulative -1 Damage as the throw sheds momentum.

penetratingshot0.name: Penetrating Shot
penetratingshot0.description: You load special ammunition which deals less damage but penetrates directly through a line of targets.

penetratingShot.name: Penetrating Shot
penetratingShot.description: You fire a shot which penetrates through multiple targets in a direct line.

penetratingThrow.name: Penetrating Throw
penetratingThrow.description: You can hurl your weapon with such ferocity that it strikes all targets in a direct line.

penetratingThrow.name: Penetrating Throw
penetratingThrow.description: You perform a Throw weapon strike which penetrates to hit all enemies in a straight line.

performanceAdept.name: Performance Adept
performanceAdept.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Performance skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

performanceJourn.name: Performance Journeyman
performanceJourn.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Performance skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

performanceMaste.name: Performance Master
performanceMaste.description: You gain the Master rank in the Performance skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

performanceNovic.name: Performance Novice
performanceNovic.description:
You have learned the basic practices of art and entertainment. You gain the Novice rank in the Performance skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know a few common dances, have a collection of well-known tales, and you could probably sing or play a few popular songs. You may be trained in an instrument or two, and your capability with a brush or pen is reasonable enough that you could probably create a passable work of art.

perspicacity0000.name: Perspicacity
perspicacity0000.description: You have heightened insight into aspects of your surroundings. You gain +2 Boons to any Awareness skill test which does not rely upon eyesight.

pinningshot00000.name: Pinning Shot
pinningshot00000.description: You fire a tactically placed shot to pin your target against a nearby surface.

pinningShot.name: Pinning Shot
pinningShot.description: You Strike from distance. The attack is Difficult, however if your target is it it becomes @Condition[restrained] until the end of their next Turn.

pistoleer0000000.name: Pistoleer
pistoleer0000000.description: Your familiarity with mechanical firearms is unmatched. You can perform the Reload action for free once per Round.

salvo.name: Salvo
salvo.description: You fire a barrage of attacks using a one-handed mechanical weapon, shooting three times at a target without the need to reload in-between shots.

planneddefense00.name: Planned Defense
planneddefense00.description: You exert strong battlefield judgment to prepare your defenses against the attacks of your foes. Any enemy which acts after you in Initiative order suffers 1 Bane to their spell or weapon attacks against you.

poisoner00000000.name: Poisoner
poisoner00000000.description: You can apply Poison to weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage. You deal an additional +2 damage whenever you deal Poison damage and your Strikes cause the @Condition[poisoned] condition on Critical Strikes which deal damage to Health.

poisonBlades.name: Poison Blades
poisonBlades.description: You nimbly lather your blades in toxic alchemical oils which apply the @Condition[poisoned] condition on Critical Strikes.

powerfulphysique.name: Powerful Physique
powerfulphysique.description: You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

powerfulThrow000.name: Powerful Throw
powerfulThrow000.description: The maximum range of actions with the Throw tag or actions from Bomb consumables are doubled

precisionshot000.name: Precision Shot
precisionshot000.description: You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

precisionShot.name: Precision Shot
precisionShot.description: You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

preparedness0000.name: Preparedness
preparedness0000.description: You seem to always be prepared for the moment at hand. You may sacrifice your free movement for the Round to instead equip an Item from your inventory without spending any Action points.

preternaturalins.name: Preternatural Instinct
preternaturalins.description: Your quickness of mind and body are equally impressive. You gain +2 Boons to all Initiative checks.

primalist0000000.name: Primalist
primalist0000000.description:
The potency of elemental Runes flows through you. By adopting an elemental Stance you channel a Rune through your weapon Strikes. You may enter a Stance for one of the elemental Runes that you know:

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.runeEarth0000000]{Rune: Earth}

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.runeFlame0000000]{Rune: Flame}

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.runeFrost0000000]{Rune: Frost}

  • @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.runeStorm0000000]{Rune: Storm}

You may enter or change your Stance once per Turn, and your entered stance lasts until you change it or until Combat ends. While in a Stance, talents or features which apply Critical Hit effects for actions that use that Rune apply to your weapon Strikes as well.

stormStance.name: Storm Stance
stormStance.condition: You know the Rune of Storm.
stormStance.description: You adopt the Storm Stance, channeling the Rune of Storm. While in this Stance your Stride is increased by 2.

cinderStance.name: Cinder Stance
cinderStance.condition: You know the Rune of Flame.
cinderStance.description: You adopt the Cinder Stance, channeling the Rune of Flame. While in this Stance your weapon Strikes deal 2 additional Fire damage.

waterStance.name: Water Stance
waterStance.condition: You know the Rune of Frost.
waterStance.description: You adopt the Water Stance, channeling the Rune of Frost. While in this Stance you gain +1 to your Reflex, Fortitude, and Willpower defenses.

stoneStance.name: Stone Stance
stoneStance.condition: You know the Rune of Earth.
stoneStance.description: You adopt the Stone Stance, channeling the Rune of Earth. While in this Stance you gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

projectileProfic.name: Projectile Weapon Proficiency
projectileProfic.description: You have a fluent education in the use of projectile weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Projectile category.

projectileWeapon.name: Projectile Weapon Training
projectileWeapon.description: You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

quickDraw.name: Quick Draw
quickDraw.description: You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

provocateur00000.name: Provocateur
provocateur00000.description: You specialize in barbed repartee crafted to highlight your opponent's shortcomings. In combat you can launch quips which provoke your foes.

scathingMockery.name: Scathing Mockery
scathingMockery.condition: Your target can hear and understand you.
scathingMockery.description: You exaggerate your opponent's shortcomings with a scathing bon mot, performing a Diplomacy skill attack against your target's Willpower. On a success they suffer modest Psychic damage to Morale and become @Condition[enraged] for 1 Round.

pyromancer000000.name: Pyromancer
pyromancer000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Flame. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[burning] condition.

The Burning effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals half your Intellect score as Fire damage to both Health and Morale.

rallyingCry00000.name: Rallying Cry
rallyingCry00000.description: Your presence as a battlefield leader fortifies and restores the morale of your allies.

rallyingCry.name: Rallying Cry
rallyingCry.description: You emit a courageous bellow that inspires allies within 12 feet of you to remain stalwart in the face of peril. All allies within range immediately recover your Presence score in Morale and become @Condition[resolute] for 3 Rounds.

recognizespellcr.name: Recognize Spellcraft
recognizespellcr.description: You can interpret the arcane incantations of others to discern the nature of their spellcraft. When an enemy within 40 feet that you can see and hear begins casting a spell, you can identify its Rune if you also know that Rune.

repercussiveBloc.name: Repercussive Block
repercussiveBloc.description: You can channel explosive force into a counter-bash which can disarm your opponent when blocking with your shield.

repercussiveBlock.name: Repercussive Block
repercussiveBlock.condition: You Block a Melee attack with an equipped shield.
repercussiveBlock.description: When you Block a Melee attack, you can react to counter-attack with your equipped shield. This technique is Harmless but, if successful, will disarm your opponent forcing their weapon to be Dropped.

resilient0000000.name: Resilient
resilient0000000.description:
Your body responds eagerly to healing, demonstrating a remarkable ability to recover from wounds.

Your Wounds Threshold is reduced by 1, making you easier to heal.

rimecaller000000.name: Rimecaller
rimecaller000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Frost. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[freezing] condition.

The Freezing effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Wisdom score as Frost damage to Health, and applies the @Condition[slowed] condition.

runeControl00000.name: Rune: Control
runeControl00000.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

motivate.name: Motivate
motivate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeDeath0000000.name: Rune: Death
runeDeath0000000.description:
The orderly force of destruction, responsible for the corruption of all biological matter. The Death rune governs decay and destruction.

The Death rune scales using Presence, targets Fortitude, and deals Corruption damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Life.

ennervate.name: Ennervate
ennervate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeEarth0000000.name: Rune: Earth
runeEarth0000000.description:
The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Storm.

mould.name: Mould
mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeFlame0000000.name: Rune: Flame
runeFlame0000000.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: Enkindle
enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeFrost0000000.name: Rune: Frost
runeFrost0000000.description:
The orderly force of water and cold. The Frost rune governs the creation of water or other fluids and their transfer between liquid and frozen states.

The Frost rune scales using Wisdom, targets Fortitude, and deals Cold damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Flame.

condense.name: Condense
condense.description:
Your command of the Rune of Frost allows you to manipulate liquids and their thermal properties, producing one of the following effects:

  • Draw up to one quarter gallon of fresh water from the atmosphere into a container or upon a surface you touch. The created water may be affected by relevant atmospheric properties of your current location.

  • Manipulate the temperature of up to 1 gallon of water, causing it to immediately freeze or thaw. The water need not be in a container; this technique can be used to coat a surface or join two objects together via regelation. Ice created in this way remains frozen for as long as the ambient temperature of the environment allows.

  • Gather up to a six-foot cube of nearby snow, forming it into a solidified sculpture, shape, or shelter.

Condense may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeIllumination.name: Rune: Illumination
runeIllumination.description:
The orderly force of light and energy. The Illumination rune governs light and radiance.

The Illumination rune scales using Presence, targets Reflex, and deals Radiant damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Illusion.

reveal.name: Reveal
reveal.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illumination allows you to create light and exert basic control over its radiance, producing one of the following effects:

  • Create a ball of light called a "tosslight" which sheds bright light in a 20 foot radius and dim light in a 40 foot radius. The light can hover near your body, be affixed to an item or surface, or be thrown up to a distance of 30 feet. You may dismiss your tosslight at any time and may only have a single tosslight at a time, casting this spell again causes your previous tosslight to disappear.

  • Inscribe up to 200 words of invisible text into paper like a scroll, page, or book. The text is written from light itself and hidden from non-magical detection. It can be made visible by yourself or another through use of this spell combined with a spoken passphrase that you define at the time of inscription.

  • Touch a physical object that produces dim light, causing it to become bright light for as long as you maintain physical contact. Only one light source may be intensified in this way at a given time.

Reveal may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeIllusion0000.name: Rune: Illusion
runeIllusion0000.description:
The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

seeming.name: Seeming
seeming.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeKinesis00000.name: Rune: Kinesis
runeKinesis00000.description:
The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: Propel
propel.description:
Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeLife00000000.name: Rune: Life
runeLife00000000.description:
A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

bloom.name: Bloom
bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeOblivion0000.name: Rune: Oblivion
runeOblivion0000.description:
A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: Erase
erase.description:
Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeSoul00000000.name: Rune: Soul
runeSoul00000000.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

evoke.name: Evoke
evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeStorm0000000.name: Rune: Storm
runeStorm0000000.description:
The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Storm rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Storm rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: Energize
energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Storm allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runewarden000000.name: Runewarden
runewarden000000.description:
Your mastery of the arcane makes you more resilient to elemental and spiritual harm. You gain a bonus to Resistance equal to half your Wisdom for each Elemental or Spiritual damage type where you know the Arcane Rune attuned to that damage type.

When you use the Ward gesture, the Resistance provided by your Ward also increases by half your Wisdom.

ruthlessmomentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessmomentum.description: You relish the carnage you can cause in combat and continue to press the fray as each enemy falls.

ruthlessMomentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessMomentum.condition: You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.
ruthlessMomentum.description: After defeating an enemy, you immediately move up to your Stride and Strike another foe that you pass next to or end your movement adjacent to.

saboteur00000000.name: Saboteur
saboteur00000000.description: You are skilled with the use of thrown munitions. When using a consumable of the Bomb type you always count as at least Trained regardless of which skill is used and you gain +1 Boon to any involved check.

safecracker00000.name: Safecracker
safecracker00000.description: You are skilled in the arts of disarming traps and picking locks. You gain +1 Boon on Stealth checks to disable a device or open a lock.

sage000000000000.name: Sage
sage000000000000.description: Your encyclopedic learning spans every field of study. Through disciplined research and sudden flashes of insight you can call upon Knowledge to aid you during key moments.

flashBrilliance.name: Flash of Brilliance
flashBrilliance.description: You expend Heroism and experience a sudden, brilliant moment of total clarity. Until the end of your next turn you are treated as possessing every form of Knowledge.

fieldStudy.name: Field Study
fieldStudy.description: During the process of a @Action[default rest], you devote yourself to studying a chosen field of Knowledge. Upon the completion of the Rest, you gain that Knowledge for the next 24 hours or until you use this Action again.

scienceAdept0000.name: Science Adept
scienceAdept0000.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Science skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

scienceJourneyma.name: Science Journeyman
scienceJourneyma.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Science skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

scienceMaster000.name: Science Master
scienceMaster000.description: You gain the Master rank in the Science skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

scienceNovice000.name: Science Novice
scienceNovice000.description:
You've learned to study the world around you through structured observation, mathematics, physics, chemistry, and other disciplines. You gain the Novice rank in the Science skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You are familiar with the basic principles of mathematics, physics, chemistry, or other scientific studies. You know how to construct and use simple machines for the purposes of making physical tasks easier. You know some of the more commonly understood scientific theories, and given suitable time to study more complex machines you might be able to at least operate them.

seasonedveteran0.name: Seasoned Veteran
seasonedveteran0.description: You battlefield experience makes you accustomed to engaging multiple foes. Your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

secondwind000000.name: Second Wind
secondwind000000.description: Your physical hardiness allows you to push yourself beyond conventional limits.

secondWind.name: Second Wind
secondWind.description: You focus your energy and recover your Toughness score in Health.

sentinel00000000.name: Sentinel
sentinel00000000.description: You punish those who try to slip past your guard. When you damage an enemy with a @Action[default reactiveStrike], that creature becomes @Condition[slowed] until the end of its next turn.

shapeshifter0000.name: Shapeshifter
shapeshifter0000.description:
You possess supernatural ability to transform your body into the shapes of beasts.

You undergo a transformation where you assume the form of a beast that you are familiar with and which is half your level or less. While transformed you have the exact attributes and abilities of the chosen beast.

Your equipment is magically incorporated into the form that you take, however you gain no benefit from that equipment while transformed.

If your bestial form becomes @Condition[incapacitated] you revert back to your normal form with any excess damage becoming Wounds. If your Morale is @Condition[broken] while in beast form your transformation ends and any excess damage becomes Madness.

Playtest Notes

This talent and its associated actions are not yet automated.

beastShape.name: Beast Shape
beastShape.description: You assume the form of a beast that you are familiar with of one-half your level or less.

beastShapeRevert.name: Revert Shape
beastShapeRevert.description: You end your bestial transformation, returning to your normal form.

shieldcharge0000.name: Shield Charge
shieldcharge0000.description: A defensive technique in which you drive forward, slamming and pushing foes out of your path. You charge up to 20 feet in a straight line and perform an offhand shield Strike against each successive foe along your path.

shieldCharge.name: Shield Charge
shieldCharge.description: You charge forward in a straight line, passing through the space of any creatures you encounter and making a Strike against each successive foe. Any creature Critically Hit by the attack may be pushed into an adjacent space of your choosing. You may not end your charge in the same space as another creature.

shieldCombatProf.name: Shield Combat Proficiency
shieldCombatProf.description: You have a fluent education in the use of shields in combat. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Shield category.

shieldCombatTrai.name: Shield Combat Training
shieldCombatTrai.description: You are practiced at fighting with shield, using it to slam into and imbalance your foes. You are Trained with weapons in the Shield category.

shieldBash.name: Shield Bash
shieldBash.description: Following a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you Strike with your shield, causing the @Condition[staggered] condition for one Round.

shieldward000000.name: Shield Ward
shieldward000000.description: You have mastered a specialized technique to incorporate a physical shield into the Ward gesture. You may ignore the free-hand requirement for spells using the Ward gesture while you have a Shield equipped.

skirmisher000000.name: Skirmisher
skirmisher000000.description: You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any @Action[default reactiveStrike] against you.

slipstep00000000.name: Slipstep
slipstep00000000.description: Your nimbleness allows you to occasionally perform exceptionally elusive maneuvers to evade harm on the battlefield.

slipstep.name: Slipstep
slipstep.description:
As a Reaction to an action that targets you before it is confirmed, you may expend Heroism to instantly move up to your Stride. The interrupted action is nullified without being confirmed or applying any effects.

This movement does not provoke any Disengagement.

smithingJourneym.name: Smithing Journeyman
smithingJourneym.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the skill of Smithing and can work through some of the more advanced techniques and schematics given time.

The basic properties of most common metals are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer schematics and alloys.

smithingNovice00.name: Smithing Novice
smithingNovice00.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Smithing and are capable of working with most common metals.

You still need to reference schematics and books to identify particular alloys and their properties.

snakeblood000000.name: Snakeblood
snakeblood000000.description: Your supernatural toughness makes you resistant to venoms and toxins. You gain +5 Resistance to Poison damage.

societyAdept0000.name: Society Adept
societyAdept0000.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Society skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

societyJourneyma.name: Society Journeyman
societyJourneyma.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Society skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

societyMaster000.name: Society Master
societyMaster000.description: You gain the Master rank in the Society skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

societyNovice000.name: Society Novice
societyNovice000.description:
You have learned the fundamental building blocks of Society, the mores, beliefs, history and politics which directly inform the growth of culture. You gain the Novice rank in the Society skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You understand that history and politics contribute prominently to the way decisions are made at the highest and lowest levels of society, and how tradition frequently informs subgroups of society to place them in opposition to one another.

soothe0000000000.name: Soothe
soothe0000000000.description: You administer a soothing Performance which rallies your allies, restoring Morale.

soothe.name: Soothe
soothe.description: You perform a calming verse, benefiting all allies who can perceive you within 12 feet. Make a Performance Check against the Madness threshold of each ally. On success, each ally's Morale is restored.

sorcerer00000000.name: Sorcerer
sorcerer00000000.description:
Your magic is deeply instinctual and your practice of spellcraft defies traditional academic understanding.

You cannot cast Iconic Spells, but when you cast a spell using an Inflection it deals an additional +1 Damage per Iconic Spell slot that you have.

soulProficiency0.name: Soul Proficiency
soulProficiency0.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Soul. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Evoke action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

spellblade000000.name: Spellblade
spellblade000000.description:
You are an arcane warrior who can weave together Strike and Spell relying on both martial and arcane techniques in battle. The physical strikes of your weaponry partially substitute for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcraft.

While wielding a Melee weapon as your mainhand weapon, spells you cast using Gesture: Strike benefit from your weapon's damage bonus.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a melee weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

spellmute0000000.name: Spellmute
spellmute0000000.description:
Currents of magic flow strangely around you, as if unaware of your presence.

You cannot perform any action with the Spell tag. Spells which target you suffer +2 Banes regardless of whether they impose harmful or beneficial effects.

spiritbreaker000.name: Spiritbreaker
spiritbreaker000.description:
You wage war upon the mind itself, unraveling the resolve of your foes. Your actions which directly attack Morale find the cracks in a creature's will more easily, reducing your Critical Threshold by 2.

When you cause a target to become @Condition[broken], the shock to their psyche leaves the target @Condition[stunned] until the end of its next turn.

steadfast0000000.name: Steadfast
steadfast0000000.description: Your patient resolve allows you to endure psychologically grueling ordeals with steadfast determination.

steadfastResolve.name: Steadfast Resolve
steadfastResolve.description: You harden yourself against demoralization. Your Morale is increased by your Wisdom score and you temporarily gain the @Condition[resolute] condition.

stealthAdept0000.name: Stealth Adept
stealthAdept0000.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Stealth skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

stealthJourneyma.name: Stealth Journeyman
stealthJourneyma.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Stealth skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

stealthMaster000.name: Stealth Master
stealthMaster000.description: You gain the Master rank in the Stealth skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

stealthNovice000.name: Stealth Novice
stealthNovice000.description:
You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.

stilllake0000000.name: Still Lake
stilllake0000000.description:
Your life experiences provide serenity that allows you to resist the attempted manipulation of others.

Skill Attacks against you from any of the Social skills are made with 2 Banes.

stormProficiency.name: Storm Proficiency
stormProficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Storm. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Energize action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

strategicreposit.name: Strategic Repositioning
strategicreposit.description:
You are always thinking ahead about where to position yourself should danger loom. Before Turn 1 of a Combat encounter, provided that you are not @Condition[unaware], you may immediately move 4 feet in any permitted direction.

If multiple combatants have this feature, repositioning occurs in reverse order of Initiative.

Playtest Notes

This talent is not yet automated.

strikefirst00000.name: Strike First
strikefirst00000.description: Shoot first, ask questions later. You gain +1 Boon on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy whose initiative score is lower than your own.

stronggrip000000.name: Strong Grip
stronggrip000000.description:
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. While wielding a two-handed weapon that scales with Strength you may cast spells which require two hands, and attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Additionally, you may wield a one-handed Heavy weapon in your off-hand.

stunningstrike00.name: Stunning Strike
stunningstrike00.description: A challenging unarmed technique which targets vital pressure points on the bodies of your adversaries. You unleash a debilitating strike which, if successful, leaves your enemy @Condition[stunned].

stunningStrike.name: Stunning Strike
stunningStrike.description: You Strike a vital pressure point, inflicting Stun on your enemy for 1 Round if successful.

subtleextricatio.name: Subtle Extrication
subtleextricatio.description: You understand how to move away from an opponent without exposing yourself to the worst attacks in return. Any Reactive Strike against you is performed with +1 Bane.

sunderingstrike0.name: Sundering Strike
sunderingstrike0.description: You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

sunderingStrike.name: Sundering Strike
sunderingStrike.description: You make a Strike with a Strength-scaling weapon which, if successful, applies the @Condition[exposed] condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

surgeweaver00000.name: Surgeweaver
surgeweaver00000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Storm. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[shocked] condition.

The Shocked effect lasts for 3 Rounds, deals half your Intellect score as Electricity damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[staggered] condition.

swashbuckler0000.name: Swashbuckler
swashbuckler0000.description: Your bravado inspires your allies and cowes your enemies. When you Dodge or Parry a Strike, the attacker loses Morale equal to your Presence attribute. When you achieve a Critical Hit, all nearby allies who can see you gain Morale equal to your Presence attribute.

swipe00000000000.name: Swipe
swipe00000000000.description: You perform a broad swipe with your weapon, hitting two adjacent targets within your weapon range.

swipe.name: Swipe
swipe.description: You perform a Strike against two adjacent enemies, attacking both of them using a single swing of your great weapon.

tactician0000000.name: Tactician
tactician0000000.description: You are a cunning battlefield tactician, able to organize and direct your allies to act with increased effectiveness.

tacticalPlan.name: Tactical Plan
tacticalPlan.description: Using 10 words or fewer, describe a course of action to an ally who acts after you in Initiative order. If that ally carries out your described plan later in the same Round, they gain +2 Boons on any dice rolls associated with that plan. The Gamemaster may arbitrate whether or not the plan was followed.

tailoringJourney.name: Tailoring Journeyman
tailoringJourney.description:
You have a professional degree of experience with the art of weaving and can work through some of the more advanced tailoring techniques given sufficient time.

The basic properties of most common fabrics and threads are easy for you to remember without reference material, but you still need books for rarer patterns and materials.

tailoringNovice0.name: Tailoring Novice
tailoringNovice0.description:
You have received training in the fundamentals of Tailoring and are capable of working with most common cloth and patterns.

You still need to reference recipes and books to identify fabrics, leathers, and their properties.

talismanWeaponPr.name: Talisman Weapon Proficiency
talismanWeaponPr.description: You have a fluent education in the use of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Talisman category.

talismanWeaponTr.name: Talisman Weapon Training
talismanWeaponTr.description: You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: Refocus
refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

telekinetic00000.name: Telekinetic
telekinetic00000.description:
You wield kinetic force with practiced ease, bending the paths of objects and creatures to your will.

  • Once per turn, when you apply @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.inflectionpush00]{Inflection: Push} or @UUID[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.inflectionpull00]{Inflection: Pull} toH a Spell, you ignore the inflection's Focus cost.

  • You double the distance at which you can Pull, Flick, or Suspend using the @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.runeKinesis00000 propel] action.

  • You unlock the Telekinetic Flight action, suspending yourself aloft to fly and hover.

telekineticFlight.name: Telekinetic Flight
telekineticFlight.description: You suspend yourself aloft on currents of kinetic force, gaining the @Condition[flying] condition to fly and hover. You sustain the effect with Focus each round; it ends if you become @Condition[incapacitated].

testudo000000000.name: Testudo
testudo000000000.description: You are highly skilled in using shields to adopt a defensive posture. You gain double the benefit of the @Condition[guarded] condition against Weapon Attacks while wielding a shield.

thickskin0000000.name: Thick Skin
thickskin0000000.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

thoughtbinder000.name: Thoughtbinder
thoughtbinder000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Control. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[dominated] condition.

The Dominated effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals your Wisdom ability score as additional Psychic damage to Morale.

threadtheneedle0.name: Thread the Needle
threadtheneedle0.description: You concentrate to fire a shot into the swirl of melee. This attack benefits from Flanking as if it were a melee attack.

threadTheNeedle.name: Thread the Needle
threadTheNeedle.description: You fire a precise shot into melee combat, targeting an enemy which is engaged by one of your allies.

truegrit00000000.name: True Grit
truegrit00000000.description: Your physical tenacity allows you to remain composed while surrounded by foes. Your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

tumblethrough000.name: Tumble Through
tumblethrough000.description: You can use your athleticism in dangerous situations to escape harm or bypass enemy combatants.

tumble.name: Tumble
tumble.description:
Make a Athletics skill Attack against an adjacent enemy contested by your target's Reflex defense.

On a success you may move up to twice your Stride, including the ability to pass through your target enemy's space, without provoking any Disengagement reactions.

On a failure your movement is blocked and your remain in your current position.

twinnedshot00000.name: Twinned Shot
twinnedshot00000.description: You prepare two shots to fire simultaneously at a single target.

twinnedShot.name: Twinned Shot
twinnedShot.description: You concentrate to nock two projectiles at once making two Strike simultaneous attacks against the same single target.

unarmedblocking0.name: Unarmed Blocking
unarmedblocking0.description: Your honed reflexes and physical toughness allow you to block enemy blows using your bare arms. While Unarmed, half your Toughness score contributes to your Block defense.

unarmedCombatPro.name: Unarmed Combat Proficiency
unarmedCombatPro.description: You have a fluent education in hand-to-hand combat and other martial arts. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Unarmed category.

unarmedCombatTra.name: Unarmed Combat Training
unarmedCombatTra.description: You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: Grapple
grapple.description: You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

unshakeablePoise.name: Unshakeable Poise
unshakeablePoise.description: You demonstrate exceptional poise in stressful circumstances, your cool head prevailing when others around you lose their composure.

unshakeablePoise.name: Unshakeable Poise
unshakeablePoise.description: You expend Heroism to instantly recover your Wisdom in Focus. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

unshakeablestanc.name: Unshakeable Stance
unshakeablestanc.description:
You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked @Condition[prone] by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Playtest Notes

This talent is not yet automated.

uppercut00000000.name: Uppercut
uppercut00000000.description: A two-handed weapon technique where you swing your weapon upwards, making a second Strike with the backswing of your weapon.

uppercut.name: Uppercut
uppercut.description: Following a basic Strike attack which did not critically miss, you Strike the same target again with the backswing of your weapon at reduced Action cost.

versatileTransla.name: Versatile Translator
versatileTransla.description:
You have a scholarly background in linguistics or an intuitive knack for languages. Your capabilities enable you to decipher the basic meaning of text written in a variety of languages.

You can translate text of a language you do not know that is written using a common set of glyphs or characters to a language that you do know. Creating such a translation requires spending one minute per word to transcribe the text into a language which you understand.

Your translations are rudimentary and often lack nuance, but they do contain all essential points of the text.

voidcaller000000.name: Voidcaller
voidcaller000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Oblivion. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[entropy] condition.

The Entropy effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Presence score as Void damage to Health, and applies the @Condition[frightened] condition.

vowofanimus00000.name: Vow of Animus
vowofanimus00000.description: You swear a vow to destroy a specific character or creature. You gain +2 Boons to Strike or Spell attacks against to subject of your vow. You may only swear such a vow against one enemy at a time. Swearing a new vow relinquishes your prior vow.

vowOfAnimus.name: Vow of Animus
vowOfAnimus.description: You vow to vanquish a specific foe who becomes the subject of your animus.

warchanter000000.name: Warchanter
warchanter000000.description:
You are a battle-singer who turns the clamor of war into power, your chants carried on the rhythm of your own blows. You know six Chants; three Songs that strengthen your allies and three Dirges that sap your foes. You may weave multiple Chants together to craft an evolving chorus of battle, but you require the continued strikes of your weapon to fuel their song.

Beginning a chant creates an aura around you that affects other creatures on their respective turns and lasts for one Round. Whenever you successfully hit with a Melee attack, your Chant that is nearest to expiring is extended by one Round.

songOfMight.name: Song of the Titan's Might
songOfMight.description: You raise a thunderous anthem to the Titan, whose strength once toppled leviathans. You and allied creatures within 15 feet gain +1 Strength and +1 Wisdom.

songOfAlacrity.name: Song of the Hunter's Alacrity
songOfAlacrity.description: You loose a soaring melody to the Hunter, swift of foot and unerring of eye. You and allied creatures within 15 feet gain +1 Dexterity and +1 Intellect.

songOfEndurance.name: Song of the Mountain's Endurance
songOfEndurance.description: You intone a rooted hymn to the Mountain, who weathered every age unbroken. You and allied creatures within 15 feet gain +1 Toughness and +1 Presence.

dirgeOfFeebleness.name: Dirge of the Worm's Feebleness
dirgeOfFeebleness.description: You hum a mocking lament that names your enemies the crawling Worm, fit only to grovel. Enemy creatures within 15 feet suffer 1 Bane to all of their actions.

dirgeOfLethargy.name: Dirge of the Glutton's Lethargy
dirgeOfLethargy.description: You drone a dragging requiem to the Glutton, too bloated and idle to stir. Enemy creatures within 15 feet gain lose Free Movement and reduce their Stride by 2.

dirgeOfFragility.name: Dirge of the Husk's Fragility
dirgeOfFragility.description: You keen a brittle threnody for the Husk, hollow and ready to crumble. Enemy creatures within 15 feet suffer Vulnerability of 2 to all damage types.

warden0000000000.name: Warden
warden0000000000.description:
You are a keeper of the old ways, a battle-druid who calls upon ancestral spirits of nature to shelter those under your protection.

You use @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.warden0000000000 ancestralGrove] to call forth an area of natural protection originating from the spiritual projection of an Ancestral Guardian.

Playtesting

The passive Resistance aura radiated by the Ancestral Guardian is not yet fully automated, pending further Aura and Region improvements.

ancestralGrove.name: Ancestral Grove
ancestralGrove.description:
You call forth an @UUID[Compendium.crucible.summons.Actor.ancestralGuard00]{Ancestral Guardian} which manifests at a point you can see within 30 feet. The Guardian is an incorporeal spirit that cannot be harmed or moved. Creatures can pass through its space, but it counts as three creatures for the purposes of determining whether an enemy is @Condition[flanked].

The Guardian emanates an aura with a 20 foot radius that increases the Resistance of allies to all damage types by +2.

So long as the Guardian endures, your weapon attacks against enemies within this aura cause a transfer of life-force from your enemies to your allies. Your target suffers additional Poison damage equal to half your Wisdom, which is transferred as Health restoration to yourself or an ally within the grove who currently has the lowest Health.

The Guardian remains until Combat ends, or until the Warden uses this Action again.

warmage000000000.name: War Mage
warmage000000000.description: Your spellcraft is honed as a weapon of war to thwart the incantations of other magi. You may ask the Gamemaster if you know a Rune capable of countering an enemy spell, even if you do not recognize the spell being cast. You gain +2 Boons to any @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.counterspell0000 counterspell] attempt.

weakpoints000000.name: Weak Points
weakpoints000000.description: You identify moments of opportunity to strike at an enemy's weak points. When attacking a target that is @Condition[unaware], @Condition[flanked], or @Condition[exposed] using a weapon which scales with Dexterity, you gain +2 damage to any Strike.

wildernessAdept0.name: Wilderness Adept
wildernessAdept0.description: You gain the Adept rank in the Wilderness skill, providing a +2 Skill Bonus.

wildernessJourne.name: Wilderness Journeyman
wildernessJourne.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Wilderness skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

wildernessMaster.name: Wilderness Master
wildernessMaster.description: You gain the Master rank in the Wilderness skill, providing a +3 Skill Bonus.

wildernessNovice.name: Wilderness Novice
wildernessNovice.description:
You have received training in the basics of wilderness survival and traversal. You gain the Novice rank in the Wilderness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to find and construct safe shelter from the elements, to start a fire for warmth, to keep cool in hot environments. You can find safe, drinkable water in most places, and how to identify which plants and animals can serve as safe food sources.

wildspeaker00000.name: Wildspeaker
wildspeaker00000.description: You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

wildspeak.name: Wildspeak
wildspeak.description:
If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

wizard0000000000.name: Wizard
wizard0000000000.description: You are a consummate scholar of the arcane who can sustain fluidity and momentum in your spellcraft. Once per Turn when you cast a Spell, you can carry forward a portion of its magic to reduce the Focus cost of an immediately subsequent Spell by 1.

wrestler00000000.name: Wrestler
wrestler00000000.description: Through leverage and technique you seize and hold creatures far larger than yourself. The Size of creature you can @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.unarmedCombatTra grapple], and be Grappled by, increases by 1.

zealoussmite0000.name: Zealous Smite
zealoussmite0000.description: You can imbue righteous power into your blow with a Strength-based weapon.

zealousSmite.name: Zealous Smite
zealousSmite.condition: You are attacking an enemy with a Strength-based weapon.
zealousSmite.description: You Strike using a Strength-based weapon. The attack becomes Deadly and any damage dealt is Radiant.
